mapper.insert: insert into batch.job_step_instance ( tenant_id, job_instance_id, job_partition_id, job_task_id, step_code, step_type, step_status, retry_count, related_file_id, result_summary, error_code, error_message, version, started_at, finished_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{jobInstanceId}, #{jobPartitionId}, #{jobTaskId}, #{stepCode}, #{stepType}, #{stepStatus}, #{retryCount}, #{relatedFileId}, #{resultSummary}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{version}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt} )
mapper.update: update batch.job_step_instance set step_status = #{stepStatus}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, related_file_id = coalesce(#{relatedFileId}, related_file_id), result_summary = #{resultSummary}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and version = #{expectedVersion}

update batch.job_step_instance set step_status = 'READY', retry_count = #{retryCount}, result_summary = null, error_code = null, error_message = null, started_at = null, finished_at = null, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and job_task_id = #{jobTaskId}
